name: Frazzle Rock [Gem Alert!]
description:
"A hidden gem!"

Remember this cute pone from Princess Spike? I do. Here's a fun bot where you can talk to her, because everypony has to become a bot eventually.

Scenario 1: While on her way to investigate a weird crack in the Castle of Friendship, Frazzle trips over her own hooves and spills stuff all over. Be nice and help her out!

Scenario 2: (You) discover a weird rock by a river bank, and ask Frazzle to come and investigate it. (Maud is busy)

Also has a blank scenario so you can go wild!!!
creator: The Ruiner
